courses.title: Introduction to Angular framework
courses.description: Learn the fundamentals of Angular including components, directives, routing, data binding and form integration.

courses.title: Advanced Web Applications
courses.description: Deep dive into asynchronous programming, state management, HTTP communication, performance optimization and SSR.

courses.title: Database Management Systems
courses.description: Explore relational database design, SQL querying, transaction management, indexing techniques and NoSQL alternatives.

courses.title: Human Computer Interaction
courses.description: Introduction to user-centered design, prototyping, usability testing guidelines and interaction models.

courses.title: Cloud Architecture & DevOps
courses.description: Analyze cloud deployment models, containerization with Docker, orchestration, CI/CD pipelines and microservices.

courses.title: Artificial Intelligence Basics
courses.description: Fundamental concepts in machine learning, search algorithms, neural networks and knowledge representation systems.

courses.title: Advanced Angular
courses.description: Learn advanced Angular features, state management, custom directives and micro-frontends.
